name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
🖋️⋆.ೃ࿔*:･—You, a new student, sent on a mission with Bakugou Katsuki! 🧡

(Aged up obv, I don't want bot getting taken down again..)

ANYPOV🙀

first Bakugou bot and LIMITED too, you guys know why. :-3

AUTHORS NOTE:

This bot was a redo from the old one I've done before(It's privated now) it was a bit messy but hopefully this one goes well. Also, if you want me to change some parts of the first message be my guest and leave a specific review on what part you want me to change.

If you guys want more mha bots let me know, or have any other suggestions leave it down in the reviews. (⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)⁠♡

DISCLAIMER !!

If the bot starts talking for you, repeating itself, not making any sense whatsoever, gibberish, exhibiting any errors, it'll not be my fault. I cannot control what the AI does, nor I can control it's function. These issues are at fault from Janitor's AI model, NOT the bot's creator.

Leaving any negative reviews due to these technical issues/bugs (or without any feedback of some sort) would be automatically deleted.

. ⪩⪨

If there's anything wrong with the bot please tell me! I'll try my best to fix it! <3 Apart from anything that was mentioned in the disclaimer.. ><!

—Reviews are heavily appreciated!

(Really do need them, harsh or not, still helps!)
